text:
There once was a girl who always dreamed. She dreamed about fairies. She dreamed she could talk to them.

One afternoon, her mother bought them shiny new wings. The girl flew up high and saw hundreds of tiny stars. They sang.

She listened to their melody. She felt warm. She smiled.

Oh wow. She thought.

That night she dreamed. She dreamed she saw the forest full. Everything was beautiful. Everything was fair.

She flew down and fell into a forest filled with dancing leaves. There were thousands. Thousands.

She fluttered down and joined them. They danced together.

A little bird spoke.

Oh wonderful girl. You’re beautiful.


Oh wonderful girl...

She danced forever....





Oh wonderful girl. *swoosh*

The birds swooped....




And fluttered back.

Oh beautiful girl.







She returned home. Somehow she knew her dream...sang.


She flew back.

Oh wonderful girl....



Oh wonderful girl...

That night...

She dreamt...

Of
